title: Host-backed System.FS (replace heuristic stubs)
body:
After matrix green: host-backed `System.FS` via `beskid_host` + ABI registration; replace heuristic stubs exercised by [`FsTests.bd`](compiler/corelib/beskid_corelib/tests/corelib_tests/src/system/FsTests.bd).

## Sequencing

**Blocked on** `corelib-matrix-green` and `corelib-collections-storage-wiring`.

## Provenance
- **Repository:** `beskid`
- **Catalog tip:** [`ee88edf`](https://github.com/Cyber-Nomad-Collective/beskid/commit/ee88edf) (2026-06-07)

## Catalog scope
- **Delivery version:** v0.4
- **Workstream:** `compiler-corelib`
- **Deliverable:** `v04-corelib-complete`
